= capitalize




== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.title = this.title.capitalize()

# In:  {"title":"the foo bar"}
# Out: {"title":"The Foo Bar"}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.name = this.name.capitalize()

# In:  {"name":"alice smith"}
# Out: {"name":"Alice Smith"}
----
